title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that enables creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long with customization and creative control. The model is being integrated into more Google products for wider availability.

similar.title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
